Operation 'getLastStockPrice' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks context about what data is returned. Enhanced version specifies the return schema (LastPrice object), explains the use case, and clarifies that this provides real-time market data. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation for current pricing information.

data.current_description: Get the last traded price for a stock
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most recent traded price for a specified stock symbol. Returns the LastPrice object containing the current price, bid/ask prices, and timestamp. Useful for real-time price monitoring and market analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about what data is returned. Enhanced version specifies the return schema (LastPrice object), explains the use case, and clarifies that this provides real-time market data. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation for current pricing information.

message: Operation 'getStockAggregates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about parameters and return format. Enhanced version clarifies the period parameter options, explains the OHLCV data structure, specifies the return schema, and indicates use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when aggregated data is needed versus raw tick data.

data.current_description: Get aggregated stock data for various time periods
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated stock price data (OHLCV bars) for a specified symbol and time period. Accepts parameters for symbol, period (minute/hour/day/week/month), and optional date range filters. Returns Aggregates object containing an array of AggregateBar objects with open, high, low, close, and volume data. Useful for technical analysis and historical price trend analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about parameters and return format. Enhanced version clarifies the period parameter options, explains the OHLCV data structure, specifies the return schema, and indicates use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when aggregated data is needed versus raw tick data.

message: Operation 'getLastForexPrice' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the pair format or return structure. Enhanced version clarifies the currency pair format with an example, specifies the return schema, and explains the use case. This helps AI agents understand how to construct the pair parameter and what data to expect.

data.current_description: Get the last forex exchange rate
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most recent exchange rate for a specified currency pair (e.g., EUR/USD). Returns the LastPrice object containing the current bid/ask rates and timestamp. Provides real-time forex market data for currency conversion and trading analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain the pair format or return structure. Enhanced version clarifies the currency pair format with an example, specifies the return schema, and explains the use case. This helps AI agents understand how to construct the pair parameter and what data to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most recent price for a specified cryptocurrency symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH). Returns the LastPrice object containing the current price, bid/ask prices, and timestamp. Provides real-time cryptocurrency market data for price monitoring and portfolio tracking.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about symbol format and return structure. Enhanced version provides examples of cryptocurrency symbols, specifies the return schema, and clarifies the use case. This helps AI agents understand the expected input format and what data is returned.

message: Operation 'getStockHistory' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain parameters or return format. Enhanced version specifies the required parameters (symbol, date range), explains the return schema structure, and indicates common use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when historical data is needed and how to construct the request.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves historical stock price data for a specified symbol over a date range. Accepts parameters for symbol, start date, and end date. Returns HistoricalData object containing an array of price records with open, high, low, close, and volume information. Useful for backtesting trading strategies, technical analysis, and historical performance evaluation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't explain parameters or return format. Enhanced version specifies the required parameters (symbol, date range), explains the return schema structure, and indicates common use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when historical data is needed and how to construct the request.

message: Operation 'getMarketStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is vague about what 'status' means and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies that it provides open/closed status, trading hours, and market segment information. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation to check market availability before executing trades or data requests.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of financial markets including whether markets are open or closed, trading hours, and market-wide information. Returns market status data indicating operational state across different market segments (stocks, forex, crypto). Useful for determining if markets are currently trading and for scheduling market-dependent operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'status' means and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies that it provides open/closed status, trading hours, and market segment information. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation to check market availability before executing trades or data requests.
